taxonomy: Cyclophorus spissus is a species of air-breathing land snail, a type of terrestrial pulmonate gastropod mollusk. This species belongs to the family Cyclophoridae, which consists of various species of small to medium-sized snails. The order to which Cyclophorus spissus belongs is Stylommatophora, a group of land snails characterized by their air-breathing nature. The class to which Cyclophorus spissus belongs is Gastropoda, a group of snails and slugs. The phylum to which Cyclophorus spissus belongs is Mollusca, a group of invertebrate animals that also includes clams, mussels, oysters, squids, and octopuses.
